servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Read, write, and manage files inside a specific local directory.
requires: A local directory path — edit the command above

servers.name: Git
servers.description: Read commit history, diffs, and branches of a local git repository.
requires: A local git repository path — edit the command above

servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Search code, and manage issues and pull requests on GitHub.
requires: A GitHub personal access token — paste it as "Bearer <token>" in the Authorization header

servers.name: Everything
servers.description: Reference server exercising the full MCP feature set — useful for testing your setup.

servers.name: Memory
servers.description: Persistent knowledge graph memory that carries context across conversations.

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: Structured, step-by-step reasoning for breaking down complex problems.

servers.name: Fetch
servers.description: Fetches web pages and converts them into clean, readable content.

servers.name: Brave Search
servers.description: Web and local search powered by the Brave Search API.

servers.name: Playwright
servers.description: Automate and inspect real web pages with a full browser.

servers.name: Puppeteer
servers.description: Headless Chrome browser automation and screenshots.

servers.name: Slack
servers.description: Read and post messages, and manage channels in Slack.

servers.name: Google Drive
servers.description: Search and read files from Google Drive.

servers.name: PostgreSQL
servers.description: Read-only access to a PostgreSQL database's schema and data.
requires: A PostgreSQL connection string — edit the command above

servers.name: SQLite
servers.description: Query and inspect a local SQLite database.
